dimensions.shipping: Log-dampened code volume across merged PRs (rewards shipping meaningful units, not raw LOC).
dimensions.collaboration: Reviews given on other engineers' PRs (unblocking & mentoring teammates).
dimensions.breadth: Distinct subsystems (top-level repo directories) touched (cross-cutting reach).
dimensions.quality: Number of bug-fix / test PRs (keeping the codebase healthy).
dimensions.influence: Distinct repo hotspot files touched (work on high-churn, central code).
